description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine impedance_correction_data_3, and is implemented by a call to impedance_correction_data_3. Use this API to modify the data of an existing transformer impedance correction table in the working case or to add a new transformer impedance correction table to the working case (see PSSE Program Operation Manual, Transformer Impedance Correction Table Data). This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr, intgar = impedance_correction_data(i, realar)

parameters.name: i
parameters.description: Table number (must be between 1 and the number of tables allowed at the present size level of psse). (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: realar
parameters.description: An array of 22 elements specifying 22 values dimensioned (2,11), where REALAR(1,i) specifies Ti, and REALAR(2,i) specifies Fi. The values are specified such that the left subscript varies more rapidly: (1,1), (2,1), (1,2), (2,2), .. (1,11), (2,11). (REALAR(1,1) = REALAR. (input; 2,1) =1.0 by default; all other values are 0.0 by default).

error_codes.description: invalid transformer impedance correction table number.
ABSCISSA values are not in ascending order.
ABSCISSA value is outside of the range of -180 to +180.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
data error, warning and information messages; one or more of: - point is beyond previous end of table - invalid scaling factor.
